h1.visual_description: Large, bold, serif font used for chapter titles. Typically preceded by 'Chapter [Number]' on a separate line.

h2.visual_description: Bold, serif font, prefixed with hierarchical section numbering (e.g., 4.1).

h3.visual_description: Bold, serif font, unnumbered, used to introduce specific concepts or sub-topics within a section.

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Standard academic (likely numeric or author-date, though not explicitly shown on this page)

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: The page appears clean with no headers or footers visible; ignore potential page numbers at the extreme top or bottom in a full document context.
